description: Anonymised article reference / style code (no customer data)
Direct materials cost for the article (PKR)
Overhead allocation for the article (PKR) — enter your allocated amount
= ROUNDUP( total_cost * (1 + 0.5) / 500 ) * 500   (50% markup on cost, rounded up to Rs.500)
Shipment weight of the article (kg). Valid to 20kg; above that, get a manual DHL quote
Destination country, picked from the 'DHL Zones' tab (dropdown)
= INDEX('DHL Rates'!B:N, MATCH(CEILING(weight_kg,0.5), 'DHL Rates'!A:A, 0), zone) — PKR
